title: Campaign cadence should reanchor drift review before widening shared-root rollout work

bounded_scope.notes: Applies when a grouped rollout campaign has already named drift and the next honest move is reanchor-first review rather than widening maintenance scope.

lesson_summary: When campaign cadence names hook drift inside one bounded review window, reanchor the route and refresh source-owned rollout posture before widening the maintenance batch.
notes: Memo keeps the cadence caution subordinate to source-owned campaign windows, checked-in rollout history, and any stronger proof surfaces.
